purpose: Maintain a positive single-skill fixture for current SkillGuard checker behavior.

skipped_checks.reason: This directory is the positive single-skill fixture only.
skipped_checks.impact: Negative, stale, and blocked behavior needs separate fixture records.

residual_risk: This fixture is a maintained example and does not exercise every SkillGuard branch.
claim_boundary: This profile covers only the good_single_skill fixture files currently inspected. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
